name: Lethargic
ability: 1 player has your crab. If you guess (once) who it is, you cannot die. The Demon knows a Lethargic is in play.
flavor: I can never sleep without Mr. Claws!! Can you please, sir, help me find him? (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: During Demon Info, show the Demon the Lethargic token. If you haven't done this yet, do so now. Wake the player with the Has Crab reminder. Show the *THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU* token then the Lethargic token.
